test_state_machine.py.tests: All legal transitions, illegal transitions, transition context validation, teacher override with motivation, quiz threshold 80%

test_retention.py.tests: MVP D+7 delay constant, retention status lifecycle, retention-to-state interaction

test_kmm_service.py.tests: process_quiz_result (>=80 pass, 50-79 retry, <50 regression), retention check, teacher override with motivation validation

test_pseudonymizer.py.tests: PseudonymMap add/pseudonymise/depseudonymise, build_map for all PII types, native_language ALWAYS REDACTED, email/phone/birthyear redacted, PII residual verification, case-insensitive check, collect_known_pii

test_safeguarding.py.tests: All 9 ViolationCategory regex patterns, BLOCKED_PATTERNS coverage (student comparison, punitive tone, offensive language, FOMO, guilt, red framing, stereotypes, therapy attempt, age-inappropriate), wellbeing keyword detection, urgency ordering, safe content passes, system prompt safeguarding rules present

test_quiz_engine.py.tests: Bloom's taxonomy by state mapping, quiz generation with mocked LLM, evaluate_response scoring, teacher question priority

test_concept_mapper.py.tests: Confidence levels, LLM response parsing (array, wrapped, single, invalid), scoring weights, composite score computation, map_concept and map_error_concept with mocked LLM/embeddings

test_ingestion.py.tests: Document parsing, chunk splitting, metadata extraction

test_auth.py.tests: UserClaims extraction, JWT validation, RBAC role checks, own-data-or-role enforcement

test_orchestrator.py.tests: Graph compilation, node registration, consent gate, safeguarding gate, agent routing

test_agents.py.tests: Agent construction, invoke method, state merging

test_config.py.tests: Default values, env override, pool defaults, LLM model defaults

test_exceptions.py.tests: All 8 custom exception classes (MaestroError, NotFoundError, ForbiddenError, ConsentRequiredError, TransitionIllegalError, SafeguardingBlockedError, OverrideMotivationError, LLMUnavailableError)

test_schemas.py.tests: ApiResponse, ErrorResponse, PaginatedResponse, TargetNode, ContentAdaptationProfile validation, QuizGenerateRequest, QuizSubmitRequest, LLMRequest bounds, LLMResponse, LLMAuditEntry

test_text_agent.py.tests: Tone instructions, length descriptions, generate_explanation success/fallback/invalid-JSON, generate_recovery_mission with retry note

test_cache.py.tests: Cache key determinism/uniqueness, L1 hit/miss/TTL/graceful-failure, L2 hit/miss, L3 placeholder, unified get (L1 first, L2 fallback, all miss)

test_llm_gateway.py.tests: Model routing (Anthropic/OpenAI/unknown), retry success/exhaustion, pseudonymisation pipeline (PII residual blocks, no-context skips), audit log failure handling

test_retry.py.tests: MAX_SAFEGUARDING_ATTEMPTS=3, fallback message, retry modifications, RetryContext can_retry/temperature_override, build_retry_prompt (attempt 1/2/3, violations joined)

test_audit.py.tests: _to_jsonb (None, dict, datetime), log_audit_event insert, optional fields None

test_alerts.py.tests: Empty keywords, critical/medium/low urgency alerting, no-teacher-id skip, notification creation

test_graph_extract.py.tests: Flat dict, nested dict, list of strings/dicts, deeply nested, mixed types, empty dict

test_main_app.py.tests: Security headers (6 headers verified), error status mapping (7 exception types), CORS preflight

test_orchestrator_flow.py.tests: Consent gate (teacher op, missing student ID, valid student op), request type routing (7 types parameterised), safeguarding gate pass-through to delivery

test_pseudonymisation_pipeline.py.tests: Student name round trip, native language NEVER exposed, all PII types stripped, PII verification catches residual, clean text passes, clear destroys mapping

test_safeguarding_content_pipeline.py.tests: Safe content passes, student comparison blocks, mixed violations block, code not false positive, retry pipeline (first blocked second succeeds, all blocked serves fallback), wellbeing + safeguarding independence

test_state_transition_flow.py.tests: Six-state completeness, legal transitions cover all sources, happy path journey, regression/self-loop, illegal transition parameterised tests, quiz threshold 80%, heatmap ordering + rollup + macro, retention D+7 + lifecycle

test_auth_rbac_flow.py.tests: Student own-data access, cross-student denied, teacher/admin any-student, unknown role denied, frozen claims, custom allowed_roles

test_quiz_bloom_pipeline.py.tests: Bloom state mapping, all levels have instructions, quiz generation success/fallback, evaluate_response (perfect/zero/80%/40%/case-insensitive)

test_api_routes.py.tests: Session start (student/teacher), session end, health unauthenticated, request validation (missing fields, invalid patterns)

coverage_targets.status: Targets met: all stateful services (KMM, auth, safeguarding, quiz engine, content cache, LLM gateway) have >=80% estimated unit coverage. All critical paths (orchestrator, pseudonymisation, safeguarding, state transitions, auth, quiz, API) have >=60% integration coverage.
